result.stdout:
Hello, World! from XrmDocumentationGeneratorCLI 🤖
Executing!
Description:
  Generates documentation to PowerApps.

Usage:
  XrmDocumentationGeneratorCoreCLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate  Starts generating readme.md files.

result.stdout:
Hello, World! from XrmDocumentationGeneratorCLI 🤖
Executing!
Description:
  Starts generating readme.md files.

Usage:
  XrmDocumentationGeneratorCoreCLI generate [options]

Options:
  -connection <connection>      Connection string for dynamics 365.
  -solution <solution>          Solution logical name.
  -documentType <documentType>  Type of the generated document (simplesyntax by default).
  -out <out>                    Destination folder for the documents.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
